title: Tereza Uhlikova will defend her PhD thesis
content:
Tereza Uhlikova will defend her PhD thesis

mkulmala@helsinki.fi Thu, 30/04/2026 - 11:55

Tereza Uhlikova will defend her PhD thesis titled “Role of Arctic sea-ice concentration in ocean-atmosphere interactions” on Friday, May 22nd, 2026 at 14:00 in Exactum, B123 (Pietari Kalmin katu 5, Helsinki). 

The Opponent is Professor Anna Rutgersson from Uppsala University and the Custos is Professor Petteri Uotila from the University of Helsinki. 

The examination can also be followed remotely through Unitube:

johanemi@helsinki.fi Wed, 07/01/2026 - 08:40
The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.

The renovation will start with the construction of temporary traffic arrangements from Wednesday 7 January onwards. The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.

title: Tutkijat löysivät uusia keinoja tehostaa hermoston korjautumista MS-taudissa
content:
Researchers identify new ways to boost nervous system repair in MS

lindymar@helsinki.fi Wed, 29/04/2026 - 17:08
MS is the most common chronic neurological disease among young adults globally, with no drugs capable of repairing nerve damage available. A doctoral thesis opens up a new avenue by demonstrating the effectiveness of two different drug molecules in initiating the regrowth of a protective layer surrounding neurons.
